---
title: Notes
subtitle: Interesting things I stumbled upon on the internet
toc: false
listing:
  contents: ./
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
  feed: false
  fields: [date, image, title, author, description]
format: 
  html: 
    grid: # default widths
      body-width: 800px
      margin-width: 250px
      sidebar-width: 250px
---
